title: Engagements
subtitle: Audit and assurance engagements in your workspace
emptyDescription: Engagements in this workspace will appear here once created.
errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your engagement list.
forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to view engagements in this workspace.
noWorkspaceDescription: Select a workspace to view engagements.
notFoundDescription: The engagement view you requested could not be found.

create.title: Create an engagement
create.subtitle: Set up a new audit or assurance engagement in guided steps
create.stepClientDescription: Select the legal entity for this engagement
create.stepDatesDescription: Schedule boundaries for fieldwork and delivery
create.name: Engagement name
create.autosaveHint: Progress is saved locally on this device.
create.forbiddenDescription: You need engagement creation permission to create engagements.
create.teamHelper: Select workspace members to assign to this engagement. You will be added automatically as engagement manager.
create.teamEmptyDescription: Invite users to this workspace before assigning an engagement team.

workspace.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading this engagement workspace.
workspace.metadataDescription: Identity and record details for this engagement.

planning.title: Planning summary
planning.description: Audit planning status, readiness, and progress for this engagement.

riskAssessment.title: Risk assessment summary
riskAssessment.description: Risk assessment status, significance, and review readiness for this engagement.

fieldwork.title: Fieldwork summary
fieldwork.description: Audit execution status, procedure progress, and evidence for this engagement.

client.title: Client information
client.description: The legal entity this engagement serves.

status.title: Status & progress
status.description: Current lifecycle position and overall completion.

information.title: Engagement information
information.description: Type, framework, reporting period, and internal notes.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A calm snapshot of this engagement.
overview.highlightsDescription: Context and status at a glance.
overview.noDescription: No engagement description has been added yet.

history.title: History
history.description: Chronological activity and audit trail for this engagement.
history.emptyDescription: Activity history will appear here as changes are recorded.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configuration and lifecycle controls for this engagement.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure engagement details, reporting, and lifecycle status.
settings.readOnlyNotice: You have view-only access to engagement settings.

general.title: General
general.description: Name, code, type, and lifecycle status.

client.title: Client
client.description: The legal entity this engagement serves.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Archive or restore this engagement when its status changes.
lifecycle.archivedBannerDescription: The workspace is read-only. Restore the engagement to make changes again.
lifecycle.archivePrompt: Archiving makes this engagement read-only while preserving its history.
lifecycle.archiveConfirmDescription: The engagement will become read-only. You can restore it later if needed.
lifecycle.restorePrompt: Restore this engagement to resume configuration and fieldwork.
lifecycle.restoreConfirmDescription: The engagement will become active again and editable for authorized users.

members.title: Team members
members.emptyDescription: Team members will appear here once assigned to this engagement.
members.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to view engagement members.

history.title: Activity & audit
history.description: Read-only timeline of engagement changes and audit summary.
history.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading engagement activity.

summary.title: Audit summary
summary.description: Counts of recorded events for this engagement.

timeline.title: Activity timeline
timeline.description: Chronological audit trail for this engagement.
timeline.emptyDescription: Changes to this engagement will appear here as they are audited.

version.title: Version information
version.description: Current record versions and lifecycle timestamps.
